patch.value: Make pm-starter the canonical full ExtensionApi reference
Rewrite index.ts to demonstrate EVERY ExtensionApi capability with safe, commented DEMO examples; add capability matrix to README; full mock in tests; verify with doctor (0 collisions).

value.author: codex
value.text: Reference extension now demonstrates ALL 9 SDK capabilities safely. FIXED two output-corrupting defects in the agent draft: (1) registerService('output_format') returned a fabricated {format} that hijacked EVERY command's output -> changed to true pass-through 'return ctx.payload'; (2) toon/json renderer overrides returned JSON for non-demo payloads -> return null so pm falls through to native rendering. Added 'parser' to manifest capabilities (registerParser requires it). Verified: build+tsc+2/2 tests; functional: extension active, 0 activation/blocking failures; pm list renders native TOON (not corrupted); 'starter demo' uses custom renderer; importer/exporter demo commands run; hooks fire under PM_STARTER_HOOKS.

patch.value: All 9 capabilities demonstrated; output-corruption defects fixed; verified green.
